category_sources: source_facts.description says it backs up and restores Gmail messages; official GitHub README describes GYB as a command-line Gmail backup and restore tool.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository title and wiki expand GYB as Got Your Back; source_facts.homepage points to GAM-team/got-your-back.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README states documentation is hosted in the GitHub Wiki; the wiki is the dedicated documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/GAM-team/got-your-back; per instruction, repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official GitHub README identify a CLI for backing up and restoring Gmail messages.
